case_title: COMENITY CAPITAL BANK VS. THOMAS CHINN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100054870) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMENITY CAPITAL BANK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-16-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-05-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100046498)

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMENITY CAPITAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CHINN, THOMAS DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-24-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-22-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-02-2019
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-16-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-24-2019 CONTINUED TO JUN-05-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
